_comment: Cabal SMP user config. Set babyCreeper.spawnChance to 0.0 to disable baby creepers. Set evoker.enabled to false to disable the evoker boss + its eyes, arrows, and wing systems. HUD colors use Minecraft formatting codes; &-prefixed codes are translated automatically (e.g. &b&l). bundle_safeguard: server-side bundle mitigations (cabal-claim); set both false to restore vanilla bundle crafting/open (see README).
